extraction.one_line_summary: PINO won final mountain stage at Malbun after being in 19-rider breakaway from Lukmanier Pass; HIGITA took yellow by 2 seconds over THOMAS after late attack.
tactical_patterns: 19-rider breakaway established on Lukmanier after 50km opening hour, revealing extremely aggressive early pace tolerance by peloton.
THOMAS attacked only final 500m despite stronger TT credentials, suggesting unwillingness to deplete reserves before decisive TT stage.
HIGITA's late move gained only 11 seconds on THOMAS but strategic value in forcing leader FULSANG to chase.
RODRIGUEZ finishing second as marked GC threat indicates he avoided workload while THOMAS and FULSANG controlled.

rider_signals.HIGITA Sergio: positive: jumped third to first with 11-second gain while Thomas did chasing work, tactically astute before TT weakness
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: only attacked final 500m despite being strongest TTer, prioritizing Sunday over additional time gains
rider_signals.FULSANG Jakob: negative: forced to chase for teammate in yellow, dropped 19 seconds back despite looking strongest all week
rider_signals.PINO Thibaut: positive: second win in three months after three-year drought, showing resurgent climbing form
rider_signals.RODRIGUEZ Oscar: positive: stealthily finished second on GC stage without visible effort, hiding strength before TT
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: negative: brief move immediately shut down by leader's team, suggesting isolation or lack of form
